textByHash.1903ffc8cdbc8e79ef60a746ec77f47b46f5d244: You have an instrument now, huh? Go on through the door.
textByHash.7cd19c243456b21318e77ace477d3271f6a2776f: Yeah, you're good to go through. Olaf tells me you're some kind of outerlander bard here on tour. I doubt you're worse than Olaf is.
textByHash.8c5baf685c9120e594a02a5ec5906de5eee1c25b: No you're not. I saw your performance. I was paid well to keep you from ever setting foot on stage here again.
textByHash.9c5fa490ae74dc84123cb34137a02756031c630a: Hey, outerlander. You can't go through there. Talent only, backstage.
textByHash.ea5f157103bd796d75251940bb169d8dd13e08a2: You can't go through there. Talent only, backstage.
